snp5.11:1.1: For one stranded in the middle of the lake,
snp5.11:1.3: in the flood of great danger—birth—
snp5.11:1.5: Tell me the island, dear sir,
snp5.11:1.7:
so that this may not happen again.
The Buddha:
snp5.11:2.1: For one stranded in the middle of the lake,
snp5.11:2.3: in the flood of great danger—birth—
snp5.11:2.5: Kappa, I will tell you the island.
snp5.11:3.2: That is the island, there is no other.
snp5.11:3.4: the total ending of aging & death.
snp5.11:4.2: fully unbound in the here-&-now, don’t serve as Māra’s servants,
